Our Moments 🎬
a little film just for you
Every frame, a memory 💕
From My Heart to Yours

Ten months ago, something beautiful began —
and every single day since has felt like the universe
rewarding me for waiting for you.

You are my favourite hello, my hardest goodbye,
and everything wonderful in between.

Thank you for your laughter, your warmth,
your silly moments, and your tender love.
I choose you — every day, endlessly.

"You are the poem I never knew how to write, and this life is the story I have always wanted to tell."

10 Months of Magic ✨
milestones of our love
🌱
Month 1 · June 2025The beginning — butterflies, nervous smiles, and the feeling something truly special was starting.
🌸
Month 3 · August 2025Growing closer, learning each other's stories, silences, and small beautiful habits.
🌙
Month 6 · December 2025Half a year — midnight conversations, warm memories, and a love that kept deepening.
💖
Month 10 · April 2026Here we are — stronger, softer, and more in love than ever before.
💗
Forever Yours
with every heartbeat — always 💌
